quotes.text: Desire is a contract you make with yourself to be unhappy until you get what you want.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: A calm mind, a fit body, and a house full of love. These things cannot be bought. They must be earned.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: The secret to wealth is simple: find a way to do more for others than anyone else does. Become the most valuable person in the room.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: If you can't see yourself working with someone for life, don't work with them for a day.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: Learn to sell. Learn to build. If you can do both, you will be unstoppable.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: Seek wealth, not money or status. Wealth is having assets that earn while you sleep.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: You're not going to get rich renting out your time. You must own equity to gain your financial freedom.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: Play long-term games with long-term people. All returns in life, whether in wealth, relationships, or knowledge, come from compound interest.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: The most important skill for getting rich is becoming a perpetual learner.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: Reading is the ultimate meta-skill and can be traded for anything else.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: A fit body, a calm mind, a house full of love. These things cannot be bought — they must be earned.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: Happiness is a choice and a skill, and you can dedicate yourself to learning that skill and making that choice.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: The hardest thing is not doing what you want — it's knowing what you want.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: Free education is abundant, all over the internet. It's the desire to learn that's scarce.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: If you're not 100% sure what you want to do, the most important thing is to figure it out. That trumps everything else.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: You should be too busy to do coffee, while still keeping an uncluttered calendar.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: No one can compete with you on being you. Most of life is a search for who and what needs you the most.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: Specific knowledge is found by pursuing your genuine curiosity and passion rather than whatever is hot right now.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: The internet has massively broadened the possible space of careers. Most people haven't figured this out yet.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: Escape competition through authenticity. Nobody can compete with you on being you.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: Code and media are permissionless leverage. They're the leverage behind the newly rich. You can create software and media that works for you while you sleep.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: Judgment — especially demonstrated judgment, with high accountability and a clear track record — is critical.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: All the real benefits in life come from compound interest.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: Peace is happiness at rest, and happiness is peace in motion.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: A busy mind accelerates the passage of subjective time. If you want to slow down time, be more present.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: The measure of wealth is freedom. The measure of health is lightness. The measure of intellect is judgment. The measure of wisdom is silence. The measure of love is peace.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: If you have two choices to make, and they're relatively equal choices, take the path more difficult and more painful in the short term.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: The reality is life is a single-player game. You're born alone. You're going to die alone. All your memories are alone. You're gone in three generations, and nobody cares.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: You make your own luck if you stay at it long enough.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.text: Forty hour workweeks are a relic of the Industrial Age. Knowledge workers function like athletes — train and sprint, then rest and reassess.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant
